title: X-44
description: The fastest and most optimized way to play Minecraft.
body:
## Vanilla Minecraft is horribly optimized, this modpack solves that. ##

This modpack uses the best mods that improve memory usage, and the chunk engine. This modpack is built around Sodium, meaning it will get the best amount of frames while supporting shaders via the Iris Mod. 

Here's an FPS comparison on a low end device (Intel Core i5 8265u, Intel UHD 620, 8gb RAM) 1.19.2.

**Vanilla:** 30-40 FPS

**Optifine:** 50-60

**Velocity:** 90-110

The settings are all default.  You may experience a higher or lower FPS improvement, but this modpack will always boost your FPS.

## Additional Windows Settings to help boost even more FPS ##

1. Open "Device Manager", navigate to "system devices", find HPET (High Precision Event Timer), and disable it.  What HPET does is increase performance in some scenarios, but it leads to micro stutters and screen tearing, it is up to .you to disable this.

2. Open "Choose a power plan", choose the "High Performance" power plan, and edit it, find "Change Advanced Power Plan Settings", click on it, and then find "Processor Power Management" and set the "Minimum Processor State" to 0%, what this does is prevents overheating and leads to better performance.

3.  Open "Defragment and Optimize Drives" and defrag your drivers, I recommend doing this weekly.

This pack is a "base layer" to modpacks, for example you can play with the Create mod, or Terralith while having good performance.

*I will be adding fabric and other versions support soon.* Feel free to DM me on Discord: Strayings#9069
